statement: AUDIT-FLEET-F F1 phase scanned all sessions/2026-05-01 claims*.jsonl files and produced findings.jsonl + report.md + stats.json + handoff.md.
AUDIT-FLEET-F F2 phase performed DOI HEAD checks via curl.exe and inventoried Zenodo descriptions for the four published records.
AUDIT-FLEET-F F3 phase extracted theorem/conjecture/proposition environments from the four published .tex sources and built cross-paper token tables.
AUDIT-FLEET-F F4 phase scanned all .bib files and intersected \cite keys with bib entries to detect cite-but-not-defined.
AUDIT-FLEET-F aggregator produced UNIFIED_AUDIT.md with severity buckets and three go/no-go preconditions for PCF2-V13/Channel-Theory-V13/standalone-note-fire.
AUDIT-FLEET-F severity totals: CRITICAL=0 HIGH=6 MEDIUM=123 LOW=70 INFO=4.
